$schema-note: Upstream nuxt/ui color tokens -> b24ui air-* system. Verified against src/theme/*.ts. NOTE: the mapping is often component-specific (b24ui has air-secondary-accent/-no-accent/-alert, air-tertiary*, air-boost, air-selection variants a component may use instead). Treat these as the default semantic mapping; pick the precise air-* token per component during porting (PORTING.md §4).
